smg.text: Slight flooding will occur in Inner Harbour area from 8 am ~ 12 pm due to astronomical tide. Cloudy. Occasional showers. Force 4 to 5 east to southeasterly winds, occasionally force 6.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
